title: Custom End Crystals
description: Customize how your end crystals are rendered!
body:
# Make your crystals look amazing!

this mod just lets you change how your end crystals are rendered.

__this mod requires YACL for configuration.__

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/iYef7y2lbRk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


### Credits

Thanks to SakuraFX for making the mod icon!

### Contact
if you want to contact me about anything regarding the mod (e.g suggestions / feature requests, bug reports, translations, etc.), join the discord linked.
